inputs.label: Required Sleep per Day (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Ideal sleep duration recommended for an adult to maintain cognitive and physical performance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ideal sleep duration recommended for an adult to maintain cognitive and physical performance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir yetişkinin bilişsel ve fiziksel performansını sürdürmesi için önerilen ideal uyku süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ideale Schlafdauer, die für einen Erwachsenen empfohlen wird, um kognitive und körperliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu erhalten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de sommeil idéale recommandée pour un adulte afin de maintenir les performances cognitives et physiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración ideal de sueño recomendada para un adulto para mantener el rendimiento cognitivo y físico.

inputs.label: Actual Sleep Day 1 (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Hours of sleep obtained on Monday (first day of assessment period).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hours of sleep obtained on Monday (first day of assessment period).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pazartesi günü (değerlendirme döneminin ilk günü) alınan uyku saati.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schlafstunden am Montag (erster Tag des Bewertungszeitraums).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures de sommeil obtenues le lundi (premier jour de la période d'évaluation).
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas de sueño obtenidas el lunes (primer día del período de evaluación).
